gist.headline: No more [object Object]
gist.blurb: We squashed a pesky bug that was turning your beautiful multimodal image prompts into literal string objects. The hive's vision is fully restored.
gist.summary: Fixed a TypeScript migration regression that incorrectly coerced multimodal message arrays into strings.
gist.impact: Vision and multimodal API requests now correctly process images instead of failing with '[object Object]' errors.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot looking at a picture frame, finally able to see it clearly, while Polly the bee mascot happily hovers nearby with a tiny wrench. Represents fixing the 'vision' bug.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head happily holding up a small picture frame showing a tiny landscape. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny wrench, looking proud. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Speech bubble from the robot in pixel font: 'I CAN SEE!'. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
